creator: sergey.g.aleshin@gmail.com
text:
Django 1.0.X documentation can not be built with Sphinx version 0.6 (default version in textproc/py-sphinx), explanation of problem can be found at http://code.djangoproject.com/ticket/10539

So building of www/py-django port fails if build docs option is set (via make config)

Fix: 

Link http://code.djangoproject.com/ticket/10539 contains patch but it is not correctly applies to django-1.0.2 source tree
How-To-Repeat: just build www/py-django with documentation option turned on
